top_signals.title: US Stocks Bounce and Oil Slides on Iran Accord: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US stocks are staging a rebound after President Donald Trump signed a preliminary deal to end the war in the Middle East, sending Brent crude briefly to its lowest level since the conflict started.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Latvian PM says EU Needs Ukraine Peace Talks Envoy
top_signals.summary: “Europe has to be at the table,” Kulbergs said in an interview with Bloomberg TV on Thursday in Brussels. “There should be one person if the peace talks are in place who has the political mandate to do that.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Swiss central bank readies for FX intervention if safe haven franc strengthens
top_signals.summary: The SNB left interest rates unchanged, as it highlighted the risk of renewed upward pressure on the Swiss franc amid ongoing uncertainty.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump’s Iran deal delivers key gains for Tehran, testing Washington’s red lines
top_signals.summary: The deal sees both sides commit to further talks to reach a final agreement over the next 60 days and includes a $300 billion plan for Iran's reconstruction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
